title: Tag & Bink Are Dead 1
content:
{{Top|rwm|ncl|inf|title=''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1}} {{Noncanon|legends=1|real=1}} {{Citation}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Tagbink1.jpg]] |title=''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1 |writer=[[Kevin Rubio]] |penciller=[[Lucas Marangon]] |inker=[[Howard M. Shum]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[Michelle Madsen]] |cover artist=[[Lucas Marangon]] |editor=*[[David Land|Dave Land]] *[[Philip Simon]] (Asst.) |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[October 3]], [[2001]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/11-407/Star-Wars-Tag-and-Bink-are-Dead-1-of-2|text=Star Wars: Tag and Bink are Dead #1 (of 2)}} |pages=32 |upc= |timeline= |series=''[[Star Wars: Tag & Bink Are Dead]]'' |issue=1 }} '''''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1''' was the first issue in the [[Star Wars: Tag & Bink Are Dead|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], released [[October 3]], [[2001]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Tag Greenley and Bink Otauna are Rebel officers fighting against Emperor Palpatine and his army -- until one fateful day, aboard a freighter carrying Princess Leia and the stolen plans for the Death Star, their lives change forever. During an attack on the freighter, Tag and Bink choose life over death, and "borrow" the armor off a pair of deceased stormtroopers to avoid being killed. Their new disguises get them off the freighter alive and send them off on an adventure neither of them could have predicted! ''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' is written by Kevin Rubio (creator of the internet film sensation ''TROOPS'' and the hilarious short stories "A Death Star Is Born" and "Force Fiction" from ''Star Wars Tales'') and illustrated by the masterful Lucas Marangon.'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Episode IV.1
Tag and Bink Are Dead |text=It is a period of great strife and turmoil at DARK HORSE COMICS. With Episode II still months away, editors struggle to meet the demand for new STAR WARS comics, brought on by a ravenous and unforgiving fan base. Dark Horse Editor DAVE LAND, in a move that he now regrets, commissions the ever late, always procrastinating KEVIN RUBIO to concoct a two part comedic story about two young Rebel officers set during the time of Episode IV. Even now as you read this, Kevin struggles to meet the deadline for the next book, and artist LUCAS MARANGON is slowly going insane because of the impossible visuals Kevin has asked for in the limited time that is left to draw the book. Turn the page and let the hilarious adventures commence…}} ==Plot summary== {{Plot|comic}} ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Tagbink1.jpg|Cover File:TagBinkAreDead1-CoverArt-EC.png|Cover art
